content: The Ontario SMB Green Fund offers up to $25,000 in non-repayable contributions for Ontario-based small and medium businesses undertaking fleet electrification, clean technology adoption, or greenhouse gas emissions measurement and reporting infrastructure. Administered by the Ontario Ministry of the Environment, Conservation and Parks (MECP). Eligible activities include: purchase or lease of electric or plug-in hybrid fleet vehicles, installation of EV charging infrastructure, deployment of emissions monitoring and reporting systems, and adoption of certified clean technology. Businesses must be incorporated in Ontario with fewer than 200 employees. Applications are assessed quarterly.
